siteSettings.siteTagline: Holistic skincare workshops, retreats and rituals
siteSettings.footerNote: Soulfull creates holistic skincare workshops, private wellness gatherings, and slower retreat-style experiences rooted in natural ingredients, facial massage, and meaningful ritual.

seo.title: Soulfull | Holistic skincare workshops, retreats and rituals
seo.description: Soulfull brings people together through botanical skincare workshops, private wellness circles, facial massage rituals, and slower retreat experiences designed to feel warm, sensory, and nourishing.

header.brandSub: Holistic skincare workshops, retreats and rituals

hero.eyebrow: Holistic skincare workshop & wellness day retreats
hero.description:
Welcome to Soulfull, 

A space to slow down, reconnect, and nourish mind, body & soul. 
We createholistic wellness experiences designed to step away from everyday busy life and return to yourself. Surrounded by nature & gentle energy

editions.name: Private circle
editions.detail: garden ritual for friends, brands, or teams

editions.name: Retreat day
editions.detail: slow wellness experiences under the sun

experienceSection.headingLine1: Nourish your mind, body & soul through nature, connection & holistic living
experienceSection.headingScript: Slow down the nervous system & relax
experienceSection.description: Our intention is to create a warm, welcoming environment where you can explore holistic living, learn new practises, and take time to relax and nurture yourself.

cards.title: Pure organic skincare to treat from within
cards.description: Everything starts with ingredients that feel intuitive, botanical oils, floral waters, minerals, and shorter ingredient lists that support the skin rather than fight it.
points: Barrier support, nourishment, and long-term skin health come before quick fixes.
Organic ingredients are chosen to promote the hormonal balance & to protect our skin

cards.description: Soulfull treats skincare as a whole-body ritual that includes facial massage, breath, aromatherapy, and moments of self-connection.
points: Guests can work with hands, gua sha, or crystal tools to support circulation and glow.
Every session leaves room for feeling, scent, and touch rather than just information.

cards.title: Gatherings that feel warm and held
cards.description: The Canva direction points to a brand that is equal parts educational, beautiful, and restorative, with time to ask questions, experiment, and then simply enjoy.
points: Garden sanctuary atmosphere, softer pacing, and thoughtful hosting shape the experience.
Grazing boards, fruit platters, drinks, and sun-time turn the ending into a celebration.

retreatsSection.headingScript: from intimate workshops to private retreats
retreatsSection.description: The Soulfull brand can flex around many kinds of gathering. What stays consistent is the blend of skincare education, sensory ritual, and beautiful, slower hosting.

cards.label: Signature Workshop
cards.title: Holistic Skincare Workshop
cards.description: A guided group experience exploring organic skincare, botanical ingredients, facial massage, and how to build an at-home ritual that actually feels sustainable.
cards.price: Custom quote based on group size and setting

cards.label: Private Gathering
cards.title: Soulfull wellness day retreat
cards.description: A softer private format for birthdays, hen gatherings, brand hosting, or team wellbeing days where skincare ritual becomes the centrepiece.
cards.price: Designed around your date, group, and mood

cards.label: Retreat Experience
cards.title: Slow Wellness Retreat
cards.description: Relax, unwind & enjoy a peaceful day filled with holistic treatments, grazing boards, fruit platters, lovely wines & pool side relaxation.

itinerarySection.headingScript: from learning, to touch, to shared ritual

items.title: Arrive and settle
items.description: Guests land into a calm, hosted atmosphere with tea, gentle welcome notes, and a sense of stepping into a slower rhythm.

items.title: Understand the skin
items.description: We explore what natural skincare really means, how to create a soulfull at home skincare routine and how organic ingredients can work in harmony with the skin.

items.title: Meet the botanicals
items.description: Rose, lavender, calendula, mandarin, jojoba, and mineral-rich waters become practical tools rather than abstract ingredient names.

items.title: Facial massage and product ritual
items.description: Guests apply, smell, and test products while learning gentle massage techniques with hands or tools to support glow and circulation.

items.title: Eat, drink, and enjoy the sun
items.description: The session closes with grazing boards, fruit platters, drinks, and enough unhurried time for conversation, questions, and absorption.

itinerarySection.sideTitle: The emotional rhythm stays the same
itinerarySection.sideDescription: Calm arrival, sensory learning, personal ritual, and a hosted ending that feels celebratory rather than abrupt.
sidePoints: Organic ingredients and familiar scents guide the experience.
There is always space to ask questions and personalise a routine.
The final stretch is designed to feel soft, social, and memorable.

portugalSection.description: The Soulfull deck circles around a few recurring building blocks: carrier oils, floral waters, massage, and personalised blends that continue at home.

notes.title: Build a personalised routine
notes.description: Guests leave knowing how to cleanse gently, tone with mineral or floral waters, moisturise well, protect the skin barrier, and add masks or scrubs only when they truly help.

notes.title: Blend your own botanical oil
notes.description: Soulfull sessions can include making a facial oil with combinations like jojoba, rosehip, sweet almond, argan, avocado, lavender, rose, mandarin, or tea tree.

notes.title: Treat skincare as self-care
notes.description: One of the strongest ideas in the guide is simple: skincare can be more than routine. It can become a mindful ritual that supports rest, self-love, and reconnection.

items.quote: Natural skincare should gently support the skin's natural balance and long-term health.
items.author: From the Soulfull workshop guide

items.quote: Facial massage helps products absorb, encourages circulation, and supports the skin's natural glow.
items.author: Soulfull ritual practice

items.quote: Skincare can be more than a routine; it can be a mindful self-care ritual.
items.author: Soulfull philosophy

items.quote: Choose the oils, scents, and textures that feel right for your skin and the moment you're in.
items.author: Personalised aftercare

items.question: Who are Soulfull experiences for?
items.answer: Soulfull works well for friends, private groups, hosted brand moments, hen gatherings, team wellbeing days, and guests who want a more sensory approach to skincare and ritual.

items.question: Do guests need skincare knowledge?
items.answer: No. Sessions are designed to feel welcoming, intuitive, and educational without becoming clinical or overwhelming.

items.question: Can you create private workshops or retreat days?
items.answer: Yes. Private workshops, garden circles, and longer retreat-style experiences can all be shaped around your group, setting, and timing.

items.question: Do you bring products and tools?
items.answer: That can be built into the format. Product testing, botanical oils, facial massage guidance, and selected tools can all be included depending on the experience you want to create.

contactSection.headingLine1: Take time for yourself, you deserve it
contactSection.description: Join us for a day retreat, holistic skincare workshop or a private healing session & experience the beauty of holistic living in a peaceful garden setting.
listItems: What type of experience you want
Any preferred scents, skin-focus, or add-on rituals
